content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.58%, Bank Nifty -0.85%, VIX +3.19% to 17.15 — broad index weakness but pockets of strength in IT (+0.60%) and Pharma (+0.29%). Earnings season delivering massive single-stock catalysts (COFORGE +14%, PIDILITIND +8.3%, LUPIN +3.3%, BHARATFORG +8%, PNBHOUSING +3.6%, HAL +4%). Holdings book is mostly green; focus is trailing SLs on winners and selectively adding only the strongest earnings-driven setups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1060.65,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+10% unrealized, near 52-week high (1141.90). SL at 1060.65 already at +7.8% above entry — locks in solid gain with ~2% gap below CMP 1082.5 (acceptable trail-gap). Target raise 1110→1135 to give room toward 52w high; SL stays as-is since tightening further would breach 1% trail-gap rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.8%, SL 121 intact, defensive gold hedge given VIX +3.19% spike. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 4950.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+4.7%, SL 4725.56 already at +3.3% above entry. CMP 4790, SL gap ~1.35% — within trail-gap tolerance. Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 trading sessions away — outside the 3-session binary window). HOLD SL as-is; no further tightening to preserve recovery option. If Q4 approaches within 3 sessions next ticks, will reassess for event-trim per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, SL 6960 just 0.9% below CMP 7022.5 — already tight, do NOT tighten further (1% trail-gap floor). Q4 already released Apr 30 (no binary risk). Specialty chem leadership intact (SRF +10.7% read-through). Hold SL as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, SL 836 just 0.5% below CMP 840 — already at floor of trail-gap tolerance. Q4 board meeting expected May 2026 (date TBA — monitor for binary). Hold; no MODIFY (would breach 1% gap)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, SL 365 just 0.3% below CMP 366.1. Q4 already released May 4 (PAT +30.6%, no binary). Thesis intact — bullish modifier +0.08. Let SL ride; if it fires, the 0.3% gap means small loss — already calibrated."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL at breakeven 820. CMP 831.85, gap 1.4% — within tolerance. Q4 already released May 5 (rev +22%, vol +9%). FMCG defensive in a -0.6% Nifty tape. No-op MODIFY check: SL same, target same — actually this would be no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.46,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+6.2%, SL 1310.46 already at +4.1% above entry. CMP 1337.4, SL gap 2% — healthy trail. Q4 just delivered (PAT +134% YoY, EBIT margin record). Brokerage TPs Rs 1690-2100. Raising target 1395→1450 to capture continued momentum; SL stays — no further tightening needed (would breach 1% rule and crowd CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: SL same (3025=breakeven), target same. Switching to HOLD — extended after +49% April rally, let it ride to target with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4%, SL 821.88 just 0.5% below CMP 838 — already at trail-gap floor. Q4 delivered (margin 46.3% best-in-class, Nuvama TP 910). Hold SL; do not tighten further."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% but Q4 PAT +36.6%, UVG +15.3% (best-in-class FMCG). CMP 1479.5, SL 1445 = 2.3% gap — calibrated. Stock already +8.3% today; minor consolidation expected. SL placement fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, but Q4 just delivered MASSIVE beat (PAT +88%, EBITDA margin 33.6%, USFDA Glycerol approval, +46% US growth). Earnings call TODAY 16:00 IST — could drive afternoon move. SL 2395 = 3.1% below entry, 1.4% below CMP — within tolerance. Hold through call; confidence modifier +0.12. Risk: 'sell the news' but conviction high."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 2015.00,
      "stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "target": 2110.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 just released yesterday (May 7) — revenue +17.5%, defense Q4 +46% YoY, FY26 PAT +14.7%, breakout to 52w high 2026.6. Morgan Stanley Overweight TP 1978 (already exceeded). Defense + auto dual catalyst, no binary risk (results done). Position sizing: 25 × 2015 = ₹50,375 (~5% of capital). SL 1955 = -3% from entry = ₹60 risk; target 2110 = +4.7% = ₹95 reward. R:R = 95/60 = 1.58 ✓ above 1.5 floor. Risk budget: 5% × 3% = 0.15% of portfolio ✓. Auto sector cluster check: no current Auto holdings — clean admit. Sector check: Capital Goods cluster has TITAGARH+HAL+GRSE — Bharat Forge is Auto/Defense, not pure capital goods, but adjacent. Adding adds ~5% to defense-adjacent cluster (HAL+GRSE+BHARATFORG ≈ 15% of capital combined) — still below 20% cluster soft cap."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1060.65,
      "reasoning": "Already at +7.8% protective level; raising target only — SL stays to preserve room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position; VIX spiking supports holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +3.3% gain. Q4 May 14 — monitor for binary trim in 2-3 sessions."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL gap 0.9% — at trail-gap floor; tighter would force exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL gap 0.5% — already tight; cannot tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL just 0.3% below CMP; thesis intact post Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; FMCG defensive, hold to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.46,
      "reasoning": "SL locks +4.1% gain; raising target to 1450 to capture brokerage TP momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 3025; defense PSU extended, let ride to 3225 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL gap 0.5% — at trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst delivered; SL 2.3% below CMP — calibrated for normal chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold through 16:00 earnings call; massive Q4 beat priced; SL 1.4% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIDILITIND already held (no add). COFORGE already held (no add). LAURUSLABS — at ATH, ex-dividend today, both Kotak and GS Sell with TPs below CMP — REJECT new entry. SRF — bullish read on chemicals but no Q4 specifics in data, not pursuing. CAMS already held. MARICO already held. ABCAPITAL already held. KPIL — Q4 results May 14 (within 3 sessions on May 14 = 4 sessions; check next tick if narrows) and promoter pledge ~24.55% governance flag — REJECT for now. TATATECH — wanted volume divergence read but no deep data here, defer. POLYCAB / FINCABLES — extended single-day moves, prefer to wait for pullback. WOCKPHARMA — not in deep dive, defer. GABRIEL — auto component cluster building (BHARATFORG admitted), avoid stacking. RAMCOCEM — no compelling edge over current book.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 58% pre-trade, with BHARATFORG add ~63% — still below 80% soft target with healthy buffer. Book is heavily earnings-catalyst-driven (8 of 12 holdings have just-released Q4 with bullish prints). HAL Q4 May 14 is the next binary watch — 4 sessions away today, will become 3-session binary by Monday tick — plan trim/exit decision then. HFCL OPEN BUY 600x @ 133.50 has been pending 53+ hours (3206m) — that's a stale order from a prior session. Recommend cancelling next tick if still unfilled and HFCL not in current data. VIX +3.19% to 17.15 a yellow flag — keep cash buffer at ₹169K+ (16-17% of capital) for opportunity, not eroding the 20% hard floor."
}
